scripts.dev: npx concurrently -n "server,client" -c "blue,cyan" "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.build: npm install --prefix client && npm run build --prefix client && npm install --prefix server && cd server && npx prisma generate --schema ../prisma/schema.prisma && npm run build
